Metadata.title: BODY32 | Discover Your Wellness Personality
Metadata.description: Discover your type among 32 wellness identities and meet your Guardian with a personal BODY32 Passport.

Landing.title: Read your rhythm. Discover <accent>your kind of balance.</accent>
Landing.description: A short reflection on your everyday energy and recovery patterns. Answer 20 questions to meet your Guardian among 32 BODY32 identities.

how.title: Reflect, understand, and keep it.
how.description: A calm look at your everyday patterns—not another complicated assessment.

reflect.title: Reflect on your rhythm
reflect.description: Answer 20 approachable questions about energy, recovery, environment, and routine.

decode.title: Decode your balance
decode.description: Transparent rules translate your answers into four rhythms and five-element tendencies.

meet.title: Meet your Guardian
meet.description: Discover your identity among 32 types and receive your personal BODY32 Passport.

guardian.title: Not just a score. An identity worth remembering.
guardian.description: Every BODY32 type comes with a distinct Guardian, a story about balance, and a Passport made to save and share.

principles.title: Light on curiosity. Careful with your information.

private.title: No account required
private.description: The core experience never asks for an account or email address.

transparent.title: Transparent by design
transparent.description: Understandable rules show how your answers contribute to your result.

inclusive.title: Language without judgment
inclusive.description: There is no good or bad body. Every type has strengths worth recognizing.

principles.note: BODY32 is a wellness self-discovery experience, not a medical diagnosis or a substitute for professional healthcare advice.

final.title: What story does your body tell?

Landing.footer: Decode Your Body. Balance Your Life.

intro.title: Think of the version of you that feels most familiar right now.
intro.description: There are no right answers. Reflect on your usual self over the past two to four weeks and choose what feels natural.
intro.note: Your answers are used only to calculate the result on this device and are not stored on a server in this version.

Quiz.answerLegend: Choose how closely this sounds like you

complete.title: We found your BODY32 pattern.
complete.description: The same transparent rules interpreted all 20 answers to find your closest rhythm and Guardian pattern.
complete.nextNote: Your full Guardian story, Balance, and Passport will connect in the next stage.

confidence.low: A nuanced pattern between two tendencies
